target.title: Document cluster fixer operations visibility
target.body:
## Summary
- Document Track 5 cluster-fixer behavior for conflict self-heal, inherited replacement-label cleanup, failed-review retries, and bot-owned proof handling.
- Add passive README/dashboard and hosted-dashboard operation counters for the new action markers, with zero-by-default behavior until dependent lanes emit markers.
- Add hosted dashboard coverage for `/api/events` operation counter aggregation.

## Validation
- pnpm run check

## Notes
- This implements Track 5 only. The docs describe intended dependent behavior cautiously where Tracks 1-4 are not necessarily present, and the ops counters are passive until existing or future lanes emit matching action markers.
- Pre-coding duplicate search found no exact existing fix PR or issue in openclaw/clawsweeper; broader openclaw/openclaw search hit GitHub Search API rate limits during the earlier check.
target.author: romneyda
